html:
The Dark Sword is a magical melee weapon. It requires a Shadow Manipulator to prototype and costs 5 Nightmare Fuel and 1 Living Log to craft. It is one of Maxwell's starting items.

The Dark Sword does 68 damage per hit and has 100 uses. It also drains Sanity by 20 /minute while equipped.

Hamlet

In the Don't Starve: Hamlet DLC, Dark Swords can be bought for 50 Oincs at The Flying Pig Arcane Shop in the Pig City.

Tips

  • Saving Maxwell's Dark Sword for stronger mobs or other emergency situations is advised until it's possible to craft more.
  • The Dark Sword is one of the strongest melee options in the game in terms of reliable, player-dealt damage. Due to their perks, the Dark Sword proves the most useful when wielded by Wolfgang, Maxwell and Wigfrid.

Trivia

  • The Dark Sword was added in the Insanity! update.
  • The design of the Dark Sword appears to be a combination of Nightmare Fuel's visual elements and the shape of a scimitar, a sword stereotypically used by Ottomans and relative Middle Eastern populace, originating in the 9th century (along with its usage seen in some parts of North India).
  • Maxwell’s quote for the Dark Sword appears to a reference to the famous line from the poem The Jabberwocky by Lewis Carroll.

Gallery

  • The poster Insanity! update, showcasing the Dark Sword.
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • The Dark Sword when left on the ground.

The '''Dark Sword''' is a [[Magic Tab|magical]] [[Weapon#Melee Weapons|melee weapon]]. It requires a [[Shadow Manipulator]] to prototype and costs 5 [[Nightmare Fuel]] and 1 [[Living Log]] to craft. It is one of [[Maxwell/Character|Maxwell's]] starting items.

The Dark Sword does 68 damage per hit and has 100 uses. It also drains [[Sanity]] by 20 {{sanity}}/minute while equipped. 
__NOTOC__
=== {{Ham}} Hamlet ===
In the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet]]'' DLC, Dark Swords can be bought for 50 [[Oinc]]s at [[The Flying Pig Arcane Shop]] in the [[Pig City]].

== [[File:Prototype.png|32px|link=]] Tips ==
* Saving Maxwell's Dark Sword for stronger mobs or other emergency situations is advised until it's possible to craft more.
* The Dark Sword is one of the strongest melee options in the game in terms of reliable, player-dealt damage. Due to their perks, the Dark Sword proves the most useful when wielded by [[Wolfgang]], Maxwell and [[Wigfrid]].

== [[File:Placeholder.png|32px|link=]] Trivia ==
* The Dark Sword was added in the ''[[Version History#Insanity!|Insanity!]]'' update.
* The design of the Dark Sword appears to be a combination of Nightmare Fuel's visual elements and the shape of a [[Wikipedia:Scimitar|scimitar]], a sword stereotypically used by Ottomans and relative Middle Eastern populace, originating in the 9th century (along with its usage seen in some parts of North India).
* Maxwell’s quote for the Dark Sword appears to a reference to the famous line from the poem ''[[Wikipedia:Jabberwocky|The Jabberwocky]]'' by Lewis Carroll.
